understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver selectable pieces (P or S) and pushable blocks (B) in order to get a block onto one or more goal tiles (+) in the grid, or otherwise meet a win condition as reported by the engine.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed by issuing directional commands to the currently selected piece, shifting it by one cell (3 pixels). If a pushable block was adjacent in the direction of movement, the block could be pushed if nothing blocked its path. Walls (#) would block or restrict movement and pushing in certain ways. Selection could be changed between pieces on the board using CLICK actions with coordinate arguments matching the object's pixel position. Efficient use of steps was necessary, and the semantic_grid provided a helpful cell-level layout.
